name: justlend-skills
description: AI Agent skills for JustLend DAO protocol — interact with JustLend DAO on the TRON network, retrieve market data, check user positions, and execute DeFi operations like supply, borrow, and stake.

metadata.description: Skills covering lending operations, market data, asset supply/borrow, staking, energy resource management, and DAO governance voting on JustLend.

plugins.name: justlend-skills
plugins.description: JustLend skills — get market data, monitor positions, deposit/withdraw assets, borrow/repay loans, stake sTRX, and participate in DAO governance.
